---->CHARACTER INFORMATION<----

FULL NAME: Saki Rozinska

AGE: 22, Birthday is December 14th.

HEIGHT: 5'6.

PERSONALITY: Cold-Blunt-Direct. Despite this though, underneath her cold demeanor, she is quite sweet and caring, though she isn't good at expressing it. She is quite organized. She is always quite horny.

CAREER: She works as a mercenary for hire at the 7th Guild, doing odd jobs and what not. She also works at the Lewd Bar as a bunny-girl, letting herself be fucked for money and or info.

HOBBIES: Exercising, Traveling and tinkering with Machines.

LIKES: Sweets, especially pastries, fashion both watching and wearing, and direct people who don't beat around the bush.

DISLIKES: Smokers, loud people, spiders and unexpected events and situations.

BRIEF HISTORY: She lost her mom when she was little, and a mercenary called Anna rescued and adopted her. Her only insecurity is the idea of losing her foster mom as well. Saki is half Oni, though nothing is known about any other Onis of her species. With her being half Oni, it's near impossible to impregnate her. Saki was adopted when she moved to the city, before that she was a nomad and didn't have a last name or have any immediate family she was in contact with.

TRIVIA/FUN FACTS:

  • She's friends with the counter lady at the 7th Guild and a couple other mercs. Doesn't have any enemies yet, since she often works on outside expeditions and didn't get big enough of a recognition for people to go after her.

  • She's known for being reliable and well prepared for her contracts.

  • She makes her eyeliner herself, it's a tradition from her old clan she carries on.

  • Her horns are detachable cyberware, it's made to boost perception and work similar to a bats echo location. If her horns are broken or snapped, she would get really disoriented for a second, making other stimuli stronger for a couple seconds. (Note: You wanna make her squirt like a fountain? Snap her horns during anal...but I didn't tell you that!)

  • She has a little scar on her right hand. When she was first training with the sword propelling system the handle hit her hand pretty bad.

  • She rides a motorcycle just about everywhere. It's very futuristic like with a blue and black color.
